Bench marking on RCN settings
•Radius for neighbourhood matrix
•Run r = 100/150/200/300 px 
(32.5/ 48.75/ 65/97.5 µm)
•Kmeans clustering
•Use yellowbrick.cluster_elbow to 
diagnose the choice of k.
•Set k = 20. 
r = 100
r = 200
 r = 300r = 150

Bench marking on RCN settings
•Radius for neighbourhood matrix
•Run r = 100/150/200/300 px (32.5/48.75/65/97.5 µm)
•Kmeans clustering
•Use yellowbrick.cluster_elbow to diagnose the choice of k.
•Set k = 20.

Bench marking on RCN settings
•Radius for neighbourhood matrix
•Run r = 100/150/200/300 px (32.5/48.75/65/97.5 µm)
•Kmeans clustering
•Use yellowbrick.cluster_elbow to diagnose the choice of k.
•Setting radius = 300 px causing the loss of CD4T RCN.
•The other RCNs are still similar.

Bench marking on RCN settings
•Cellular neighbour matrix contains the proportion of neighouring cells for each cell. 
•For each cell, calculate the Gini index of its neighbour.
•Calculate the mean + sd Gini index per sample. 
•Similarly, calculate the number of cells in each cell’s neighborhood and show mean + sd per sample. 
Mean Gini index across 12 images Mean cell count in a neighbour across 12 images
Sample order: High -> low cell counts
